dashboard.label: 3. MITRE ATT&CK Coverage
dashboard.description: Detection coverage across the ATT&CK matrix. Grid layout by tactic â€” click a technique to pivot to detections.

search.query: index=notable | stats count by mitre_technique | sort -count

| makeresults | eval technique=split("T1566.001|Spearphishing Attachment", "@") | mvexpand technique | eval technique_id=mvindex(split(technique, "|"),0), name=mvindex(split(technique, "|"),1) | join type=left technique_id [search index=notable earliest=$time.earliest$ latest=$time.latest$ | rex field=mitre_technique "^(?<technique_id>T\d+(?:\.\d+)?)" | stats count as detections by technique_id] | fillnull value=0 detections | eval status=if(detections>0,"FIRING","idle") | table technique_id name detections status

| makeresults | eval x=split("T1059.001|PowerShell,T1059.003|Windows Command Shell", ",") | mvexpand x | eval technique_id=mvindex(split(x, "|"),0), name=mvindex(split(x, "|"),1) | join type=left technique_id [search index=notable mitre_tactic=Execution earliest=$time.earliest$ latest=$time.latest$ | rex field=mitre_technique "^(?<technique_id>T\d+(?:\.\d+)?)" | stats count as detections by technique_id] | fillnull value=0 detections | eval status=if(detections>0,"FIRING","idle") | table technique_id name detections status

| makeresults | eval x=split("T1547.001|Run Keys,T1053.005|Scheduled Task", ",") | mvexpand x | eval technique_id=mvindex(split(x, "|"),0), name=mvindex(split(x, "|"),1) | join type=left technique_id [search index=notable mitre_tactic=Persistence earliest=$time.earliest$ latest=$time.latest$ | rex field=mitre_technique "^(?<technique_id>T\d+(?:\.\d+)?)" | stats count as detections by technique_id] | fillnull value=0 detections | eval status=if(detections>0,"FIRING","idle") | table technique_id name detections status

| makeresults | eval x=split("T1070.001|Clear Windows Event Logs", ",") | mvexpand x | eval technique_id=mvindex(split(x, "|"),0), name=mvindex(split(x, "|"),1) | join type=left technique_id [search index=notable mitre_tactic="Defense Evasion" earliest=$time.earliest$ latest=$time.latest$ | rex field=mitre_technique "^(?<technique_id>T\d+(?:\.\d+)?)" | stats count as detections by technique_id] | fillnull value=0 detections | eval status=if(detections>0,"FIRING","idle") | table technique_id name detections status

| makeresults | eval x=split("T1003.001|LSASS Memory,T1110|Brute Force", ",") | mvexpand x | eval technique_id=mvindex(split(x, "|"),0), name=mvindex(split(x, "|"),1) | join type=left technique_id [search index=notable mitre_tactic="Credential Access" earliest=$time.earliest$ latest=$time.latest$ | rex field=mitre_technique "^(?<technique_id>T\d+(?:\.\d+)?)" | stats count as detections by technique_id] | fillnull value=0 detections | eval status=if(detections>0,"FIRING","idle") | table technique_id name detections status

| makeresults | eval x=split("T1087|Account Discovery", ",") | mvexpand x | eval technique_id=mvindex(split(x, "|"),0), name=mvindex(split(x, "|"),1) | join type=left technique_id [search index=notable mitre_tactic=Discovery earliest=$time.earliest$ latest=$time.latest$ | rex field=mitre_technique "^(?<technique_id>T\d+(?:\.\d+)?)" | stats count as detections by technique_id] | fillnull value=0 detections | eval status=if(detections>0,"FIRING","idle") | table technique_id name detections status

| makeresults | eval x=split("T1021.002|SMB/Admin Shares", ",") | mvexpand x | eval technique_id=mvindex(split(x, "|"),0), name=mvindex(split(x, "|"),1) | join type=left technique_id [search index=notable mitre_tactic="Lateral Movement" earliest=$time.earliest$ latest=$time.latest$ | rex field=mitre_technique "^(?<technique_id>T\d+(?:\.\d+)?)" | stats count as detections by technique_id] | fillnull value=0 detections | eval status=if(detections>0,"FIRING","idle") | table technique_id name detections status

| makeresults | eval x=split("T1071.001|Web Protocols", ",") | mvexpand x | eval technique_id=mvindex(split(x, "|"),0), name=mvindex(split(x, "|"),1) | join type=left technique_id [search index=notable mitre_tactic="Command and Control" earliest=$time.earliest$ latest=$time.latest$ | rex field=mitre_technique "^(?<technique_id>T\d+(?:\.\d+)?)" | stats count as detections by technique_id] | fillnull value=0 detections | eval status=if(detections>0,"FIRING","idle") | table technique_id name detections status

panel.title: All Techniques Detected â€” Detection Count

search.query: index=notable | stats count by mitre_tactic mitre_technique | sort mitre_tactic mitre_technique
